result:
Build is fully green (exit 0, no errors, all three binaries linked).

Summary of changes:
- `src/drivers/driver.h`: replaced `int qual; int noise;` in `struct wpa_scan_res` with `struct { int qual; int noise; } sig;` and updated the doc comment.
- Updated all `wpa_scan_res`-typed usage sites to `->sig.qual` / `->sig.noise`: `wpa_supplicant/scan.c`, `wpa_supplicant/events.c`, `wpa_supplicant/bss.c` (only the `src->` side, since `dst` is a separate `struct wpa_bss` with its own unrelated `qual`/`noise` fields), `src/drivers/driver_bsd.c`, `src/drivers/driver_nl80211_scan.c`, `src/drivers/driver_wext.c`.
- Left untouched fields that only look similar but aren't `wpa_scan_res`: `struct wpa_bss`'s own `qual`/`noise` (`ctrl_iface.c`, `dbus_old_handlers.c`, `bss.c`'s `dst->`) and `iw_quality` (`driver_wext.c`'s `iwe->u.qual.*` / `stats.qual.*`).
